steps.title: Enter two months of data
steps.content: At birth, $x=0$ and the seal is $122$ cm long. After $1$ month, it has grown by $3.8$ cm, so the length is $125.8$ cm. Use the points $(0,122)$ and $(1,125.8)$.

steps.title: Fit the linear model
steps.content: The slope is $$m=\frac{125.8-122}{1-0}=3.8.$$ The $y$-intercept is the starting length, $122$, so the equation is $y=3.8x+122$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: $y=122x$ makes $122$ the monthly growth rate and starts at $0$. $y=122x+122$ has the right starting length but the wrong monthly growth. $y=3.8x+3.8$ has the right monthly growth but starts at $3.8$ cm. The model $y=3.8x+122$ has growth rate $3.8$ and starting length $122$, so D is correct.
